purpose: Validate that the MORI native compact path can rebuild and run after adding RDMA/libpci build and runtime dependencies to the TorchTitan base container.

code_change_under_test.summary: Avoid building and saving the full expert-major to rank-major permutation sidecar on the MORI native count-aware compact path. Native combine can consume recv count metadata directly and only requires the fallback permutation tensor when count metadata is unavailable.

remote_validation.rebuild_command_shape: IMAGE=onenexus/nexus-titan:rocm722-pytorch-nightly-mori-devdeps TARGET_HOST=do-sonle5-mi350-gpu REMOTE_ROOT=/scratch/sonle5/dsv4_pretrain_canary_20260527 CANARY_MORI_IMPORT_MODE=remote CANARY_MORI_REBUILD_REMOTE=true CANARY_STANDARD_EP_COMPACT_COLLECTIVE_BACKEND=mori_native GPUS_PER_NODE=4 CANARY_VISIBLE_DEVICES=4,5,6,7 CANARY_EP=4 launchers/torchtitan_direct_deepseek_v4_4x8xmi350_canary.sh stage
remote_validation.rebuild_result: passed; output included rebuilt_mori and has_compact_combine True
remote_validation.smoke_command_shape: IMAGE=onenexus/nexus-titan:rocm722-pytorch-nightly-mori-devdeps TARGET_HOST=do-sonle5-mi350-gpu REMOTE_ROOT=/scratch/sonle5/dsv4_pretrain_canary_20260527 CANARY_MORI_IMPORT_MODE=remote CANARY_MORI_REBUILD_REMOTE=false GPUS_PER_NODE=4 CANARY_VISIBLE_DEVICES=4,5,6,7 CANARY_EP=4 CANARY_DP_SHARD=-1 CANARY_MBS=1 CANARY_GBS=4 CANARY_SEQ_LEN=128 CANARY_STEPS=1 CANARY_CHECKPOINT_ENABLE=false CANARY_ACTIVATION_CHECKPOINT_MODE=none CANARY_USE_HYPER_CONNECTIONS=false CANARY_DSV4_NUM_MTP_MODULES=1 CANARY_MOE_COMM_BACKEND=standard CANARY_STANDARD_EP_COMPACT_COLLECTIVE_BACKEND=mori_native CANARY_STANDARD_EP_SOURCE_SCATTER_BACKEND=triton_flat CANARY_REQUIRE_IDLE_GPUS=false launchers/torchtitan_direct_deepseek_v4_4x8xmi350_canary.sh run
remote_validation.result: passed 1 training step; MORI imported, JIT compiled/cached ep_intranode, loss was finite, backward completed, and process groups were destroyed cleanly
remote_validation.interpretation: ABI and environment smoke only. The node was not a clean full 8-GPU performance surface, and S128/1-step timing is not promotable throughput evidence.

local_validation.diff_check: passed for the two changed Python files before artifact write

next_steps: Run the same native compact path on a clean full 8xMI350 surface with the MORI profiler enabled.
Use apple-to-apple current-best shape comparisons before claiming any throughput movement.
Continue removing adapter/layout overhead from the native compact path rather than adding route-mask knobs.
